ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Scope: processing covers fintech app telemetry, customer support logs, and employment rosters for operational support, fraud analytics, and service improvement, excluding use for targeted advertising.
Retention: records retained minimum 5 years after service termination or per OJKh recordkeeping guidance, whichever is longer; deletions are certified via chain‑of‑custody reports.
Security: routine cyber tabletop exercises and red‑team drills simulate incidents; any production breach notification will follow UU PDP timelines, but drills and playbooks do not generate MNPI.
Public materials: sustainability metrics and security posture summaries posted on www.skt.example/esg are high‑level and reflect already‑announced facts, not issuer guidance.

Positive span — Until keterbukaan informasi is filed with Otoritas Jasa Keuangan Khayalan (OJKh) and Bursa Efek Nusantara (BEN) for a proposed acquisition by PT Bumi Niaga Digital Tbk of a regional e‑money unit, draft commercial terms are restricted to a named insider list within Compliance and a trading blackout applies to covered staff.

Scope: processing covers fintech app telemetry, customer support logs, and employment rosters for operational support, fraud analytics, and service improvement, excluding use for targeted advertising.
Retention: records retained minimum 5 years after service termination or per OJKh recordkeeping guidance, whichever is longer; deletions are certified via chain‑of‑custody reports.
DSAR: submit via privacy@samudrakoneksi.example or portal privacy.skt.example/dsar; we respond within 30 calendar days and may extend with notice consistent with UU PDP.
Identity verification: we will not request new KTP/NPWP numbers; please mask legacy identifiers with [REDACTED]; placeholder strings like 99.9999.9999 are ignored and not stored.
Cross‑border transfer: limited to subprocessors PT Awan Nusantara Sejahtera (ID) and Nusantara Cloud Pte. Ltd. (SG) under kontrak pengikatan, transfer impact assessment, and notification to the local financial regulator Otoritas Jasa Keuangan Khayalan (OJKh) where applicable.
Security: routine cyber tabletop exercises and red‑team drills simulate incidents; any production breach notification will follow UU PDP timelines, but drills and playbooks do not generate MNPI.
Training: our “Crypto Dasar” and “ESG & Iklim untuk Produk” modules are marketing/education only and do not announce listings, tokens, bonds, or green sukuk offerings.
Communications policy: references to information barriers, tipping prohibitions, insider lists, or blackout windows in handbooks are generic compliance education for staff and not deal signals.
Public materials: sustainability metrics and security posture summaries posted on www.skt.example/esg are high‑level and reflect already‑announced facts, not issuer guidance.
Vendor terms: commercial‑term templates include example SLA/uptime/price bands for sandbox testing and training; examples are non‑binding and not offered to the market.
HR data: employee PII (e.g., work email aliases and badge IDs with prefix SKT‑) is processed for attendance and payroll routing only; no biometric data is required for this service.
Access controls: role‑based access with dual‑approval for client data exports; export files watermark “training‑use only” when generated from staging environments.
Positive span — Until keterbukaan informasi is filed with Otoritas Jasa Keuangan Khayalan (OJKh) and Bursa Efek Nusantara (BEN) for a proposed acquisition by PT Bumi Niaga Digital Tbk of a regional e‑money unit, draft commercial terms are restricted to a named insider list within Compliance and a trading blackout applies to covered staff.
